claims.summary: Connection time and first meaningful spectral payload need separate evidence.
claims.disposition: Verified in current trace state through connection time, first-valid lag, and first-valid entropy.

claims.summary: Only a schema-valid packet should establish the first spectral quality sample.
claims.disposition: Verified in the subscriber parse path and first-valid payload regression.

claims.summary: Reconnect must reset connection-epoch evidence without letting later packets rewrite the first sample.
claims.disposition: Verified by the reconnect and first-valid retention test.

claims.summary: Reconnect backoff should react to perceived signal quality.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 operator-approval wait because it changes live transport cadence and reconnection behavior.
